summary: Tested new Anfragen edit feature (PUT /api/anfragen/{id} endpoint and Edit Modal). All backend and frontend tests passed. Edit functionality works correctly - modal opens with pre-filled data, saves changes, and updates the list.
passed_tests: Backend: PUT /api/anfragen/{id} - Update Name, Email, Phone fields returns 200 with updated data
Backend: PUT /api/anfragen/{id} - Update categories array works correctly
Backend: PUT /api/anfragen/{id} - Empty body returns 400 'Keine Daten zum Aktualisieren'
Backend: GET /api/anfragen - Returns updated data after PUT
Frontend: Edit button (pencil icon) visible on each Anfrage card
Frontend: Clicking edit button opens Edit Modal with pre-filled data
Frontend: Edit Modal has all fields - Name, Email, Phone, Firma, Address, Obj_Address, Type toggle (Privat/Firma), Categories, Nachricht, Notes
Frontend: Saving edit updates the Anfrage, shows success toast, and closes modal
Frontend: Cancel button closes modal without saving changes
Frontend: Edit button also available in expanded detail view (Bearbeiten button)
Frontend: Convert to Customer button visible and accessible
Frontend: Delete with 2-click confirmation works (first click shows 'Löschen?', times out after 3s)
Frontend: Category filters work correctly (Schiebetür, Fenster, Innentür, Eingangstür, Sonstige Reparaturen)
Frontend: Search functionality filters anfragen by name/email/nachricht
critical_code_review_comments: Edit modal implementation is clean with proper data-testid attributes for all fields
PUT endpoint correctly validates empty body and returns 400
Token-based auth (query parameter) working correctly for PUT requests
Form state management in React is correct - editForm state properly initialized from anfrage data
seed_data_creation: Used existing anfrage: ID a76f4cd5-1f4f-4450-92fd-da450b6482df, Name 'Herr Ralph Graupner'
context_for_next_testing_agent: Anfragen edit feature fully implemented and tested. PUT /api/anfragen/{id} endpoint works. Edit modal opens from both card view (pencil icon) and expanded view (Bearbeiten button). All form fields have data-testid attributes: edit-anfrage-name, edit-anfrage-email, edit-anfrage-phone, edit-anfrage-firma, edit-anfrage-address, edit-anfrage-obj-address, edit-anfrage-type, edit-anfrage-categories, edit-anfrage-nachricht, edit-anfrage-notes, edit-anfrage-save, edit-anfrage-cancel. Token auth uses query parameter (?token=xxx).
